description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with a single job named build that runs in the default stage using the default Docker image. The job executes two shell commands: first runs `apt-get update -qq && apt-get install -y -qq ant ant-optional openjdk-8-jdk openjdk-8-jre openjfx` to install Ant and Java 8 packages, then runs `ant` to build the project. No caches, artifacts, or special rules are defined.
